title: Application RAG Status Dashboard
description: Mission Control style application health dashboard

options.query: index=your_index earliest=$input_timerange.earliest$ latest=$input_timerange.latest$ | eval app=coalesce(application, app_name, service_name) | eval url=coalesce(url, uri, endpoint, request_path) | search app=\"$input_app$\" OR \"$input_app$\"=\"*\" | eval is_success=if(http_status>=200 AND http_status<400,1,0) | eval is_failure=if(http_status>=400 OR status=\"FAILURE\" OR result=\"ERROR\",1,0) | stats sum(is_success) as success_count sum(is_failure) as failure_count count as total_count by app url | eval failure_pct=round((failure_count/total_count)*100,2) | eval url_rag=if(failure_pct>10,\"Red\",if(failure_pct>5,\"Amber\",\"Green\")) | eval green_cnt=if(url_rag=\"Green\",1,0) | eval amber_cnt=if(url_rag=\"Amber\",1,0) | eval red_cnt=if(url_rag=\"Red\",1,0) | stats sum(green_cnt) as Green sum(amber_cnt) as Amber sum(red_cnt) as Red sum(success_count) as Success sum(failure_count) as Failure sum(total_count) as Total by app | eval FailurePct=round((Failure/Total)*100,2) | eval ImpactCount=Failure | eval OverallRAG=if(Red>0,\"Red\",if(Amber>0,\"Amber\",\"Green\")) | eval LastUpdated=strftime(now(),\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\") | rename app as Application | table Application Green Amber Red Success Failure FailurePct ImpactCount OverallRAG LastUpdated

index=your_index earliest=$input_timerange.earliest$ latest=$input_timerange.latest$ | eval app=coalesce(application, app_name, service_name) | search app=\"$input_app$\" | eval req_status=if(http_status>=200 AND http_status<400,\"Success\",\"Failure\") | timechart span=5m count by req_status

index=your_index earliest=$input_timerange.earliest$ latest=$input_timerange.latest$ | eval app=coalesce(application, app_name, service_name) | eval url=coalesce(url, uri, endpoint, request_path) | search app=\"$input_app$\" | eval is_success=if(http_status>=200 AND http_status<400,1,0) | eval is_failure=if(http_status>=400 OR status=\"FAILURE\" OR result=\"ERROR\",1,0) | stats sum(is_success) as Success sum(is_failure) as Failure count as Total by url | eval FailurePct=round((Failure/Total)*100,2) | eval RAG=if(FailurePct>10,\"Red\",if(FailurePct>5,\"Amber\",\"Green\")) | rename url as URL | table URL Success Failure FailurePct RAG | sort - Failure

index=your_index earliest=$input_timerange.earliest$ latest=$input_timerange.latest$ | eval app=coalesce(application, app_name, service_name) | search app=\"$input_app$\" | eval is_failure=if(http_status>=400 OR status=\"FAILURE\" OR result=\"ERROR\",1,0) | stats sum(is_failure) as failed_requests

index=your_index earliest=$input_timerange.earliest$ latest=$input_timerange.latest$ | eval app=coalesce(application, app_name, service_name) | search app=\"$input_app$\" | eval is_failure=if(http_status>=400 OR status=\"FAILURE\" OR result=\"ERROR\",1,0) | stats sum(is_failure) as fail count as total | eval failure_pct=round((fail/total)*100,2) | table failure_pct

index=your_index earliest=$input_timerange.earliest$ latest=$input_timerange.latest$ | eval app=coalesce(application, app_name, service_name) | search app=\"$input_app$\" | eval is_failure=if(http_status>=400 OR status=\"FAILURE\" OR result=\"ERROR\",1,0) | stats sum(is_failure) as FailedRequests count as Total by app | eval FailurePct=round((FailedRequests/Total)*100,2) | eval Severity=if(FailurePct>10,\"CRITICAL ISSUE\",if(FailurePct>5,\"WARNING\",\"STABLE\")) | eval Action=if(FailurePct>10,\"Create SNOW Incident\",\"No Action\") | rename app as Application | table Application FailedRequests FailurePct Severity Action
